name: Ena's Dream Barbecue
description:
After successfully dispatching the smoke Ena has decided to throw a Barbecue and

You're invited!

It has all the fixings of a perfectly functional Barbecue! Including, hot dogs! (On bread) and tons of tap water straight from the lake! (You shouldn't drink it though) it's your job to help Ena make this barbecue go well!

Tbh the personalities of froggy and dratula are kind of weak but i was focusing on ena anyway

#EnaDreamBarbacue
creator: Siffrinenjoyer4432
